disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe colicky left flank pain radiating to the groin, coming in waves, with the patient unable to stay still (pacing/writhing) rather than lying still
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and does it spread anywhere?
What is the pain like — constant or coming in waves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's in my left side and back and it shoots down to my groin. It comes in awful waves and I can't keep still — I'm pacing the room.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Nausea and repeated vomiting accompanying the pain, unable to keep down oral intake
trigger_question_examples: Have you been feeling sick or vomiting?
Can you keep fluids or tablets down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep being sick — I've vomited several times and I can't keep water or tablets down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six-month history of diffuse aching pain throughout the bones
trigger_question_examples: You mentioned aching bones — how long has that been going on?
Have you had any longer-standing aches or pains before today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask, my bones have ached all over for about six months — my arms, legs, everywhere. I thought it was just getting older.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several months of passing large volumes of urine frequently and being constantly, excessively thirsty
trigger_question_examples: Over the last few months, have you noticed drinking or weeing more than usual?
Have you been unusually thirsty?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — for months I've been weeing all the time and I'm always thirsty, I can't seem to drink enough.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Longstanding severe constipation over months, not relieved by over-the-counter laxatives
trigger_question_examples: How have your bowels been?
Any problems with constipation?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been terribly constipated for months. I've been buying laxatives and they barely help.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several months of marked tiredness and generalised muscle weakness
trigger_question_examples: How have your energy levels been?
Have you felt weak or run down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been shattered for months — no energy, and my muscles feel weak.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever and no shaking chills reported (patient self-assessment, no thermometer)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had a fever or shaking chills?
Do you feel hot and cold or shivery?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel a bit warm but I haven't taken my temperature, and I haven't had any shaking chills.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Still passing some urine, though reduced in the context of vomiting and poor oral intake
trigger_question_examples: Are you still able to pass urine normally?
Has your urine output dropped or stopped?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm still weeing a bit, but less than usual — I think because I can't keep any fluids down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one at home to help; unable to keep fluids down raising dehydration concern
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone at home with you?
Do you have help if this gets worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own, there's no one here with me, and I'm worried because I can't keep anything down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has been self-treating with over-the-counter anti-inflammatory painkillers and laxatives without relief
trigger_question_examples: What have you taken for the pain so far?
Are you taking any medicines, including anything from the chemist?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've taken anti-inflammatory tablets from the chemist for the pain and laxatives for the constipation, but none of it is working.
